events.name: ScoreStreak2
events.comment: Tracks user score streak (for time boost)

events.name: ScoreStreakTracker2
events.comment: Tracks if the the streak is active

events.name: LevelTimeScale2
events.comment: Time scale for the level (how fast everything happens, 1.0 is normal: 1s in game is 1s irl)

actions.text: On the start of the layout, fade out main menu theme + fade in level music (to the GlobalVolume set by user)

On start of the level:
- Set time scale (the larger the value, the faster items will be thrown around)
- Set GameManager time scale to 1.0 (so spawn timers will be relative to real time scale, not game time scale)
- Call SpawnItem for waste items to start spawning
- Call SpawnDistraction for distraction items to start spawning
- Set and start timer for SpawnItem (interval in seconds in which a new waste item spawns)
- Set and start timer for SpawnDistraction (interval in seconds in which a new distraction item spawns)
Set in-game timer to subtract 1 from Timer after 1s irl

children.name: SCREENHORIZONTALMARGIN
children.comment: Constant variable for screen's horizontal margin for item spawn area

children.name: RandomInt
children.comment: Picks random integer from 0 to 100 for determining which waste variation to spawn

children.name: RecycleVariation
children.comment: All recycle objects will have an equal chance to spawn

children.name: RandomInt
children.comment: Picks random integer from 0 to 100 for determining which waste variation to spawn

children.name: CompostVariation
children.comment: All compost objects will have an equal chance to spawn

parameters.value: clamp(CurrentValue + Direction * abs(Speed) * 60 * dt, TargetValue, Infinity)
